subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in truth is verily His Most Straight Path amidst the nations and the Balance of Guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر بالحق انه لصراطه الاقوم بین الامم و میزان الهدی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
